response.justification: The candidate is a skilled senior developer with a diverse background, but there is a fundamental mismatch with the core requirements of the role. His professional C++ experience is very limited, from nearly a decade ago, and far short of the 5-10 years required. Furthermore, he lacks any experience in the specified financial domains like Capital Markets or Fixed Income. His expertise lies primarily in web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript), Dlang, and DevOps, which are not aligned with this C++/Windows-focused financial systems position.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior developer with clear career progression.
Strong background in DevOps, CI/CD, and a variety of programming languages.
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source projects.
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development experience.
No demonstrated experience in the mandatory Capital Markets or Fixed Income domains.
Primary technical platform experience is in web/Linux environments, not C++ on Windows.
